## Summary

<!-- What user/doctor outcome changes, and why? -->

## Scope

- Related issue/plan:
- Change type: bugfix / feature / breaking / docs / operations
- Release classification: none / patch / minor / major

## Verification

- [ ] Behavior changes include matching tests.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Self scan and strict drift remain green/Grade A.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is synchronized across English, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese READMEs plus `SKILL.md`.
- [ ] Action/workflow changes include their structural tests and real `uses: ./` coverage where required.
- [ ] Eval evidence is refreshed when `AGENTS.md` or its evidence-bound task pack changes.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] Repository reads/writes preserve containment, symlink, ownership, and dry-run boundaries.
- [ ] Installer tests use an isolated `HOME`.
- [ ] No secret, token, credential, private repository content, or personal data is committed.
- [ ] Backward compatibility and any explicit STOP condition are documented.

## Evidence

<!-- Focused test counts, CI links, screenshots, sanitized reports, or before/after reproduction. -->
